nasb.text: They handed the burnt offering to him in pieces, with the head, and he offered them up in smoke on the altar.

esv.text: And they handed the burnt offering to him, piece by piece, and the head, and he burned them on the altar.

cnv.text: 他們跟著把燔祭牲一塊一塊連頭遞給他，焚燒在祭壇上。

ccb.text: 他们将祭牲切成块，连头颅一起交给亚伦献在坛上焚烧。
